overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the historic city of Saint Denis. The scene transitions from cobblestone streets with a vintage streetcar to a formal park with a prominent equestrian statue, featuring period-appropriate NPCs and architecture under hazy morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with tram tracks

events.description: vintage streetcar passes by from left to right, temporarily occupying the center of the frame
character turns right at intersection, changing direction from straight to diagonal

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone street, navigating around the streetcar and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vintage streetcar moving along tracks, passing in front of the camera from left to right

entered.detail: wet cobblestone street with tram tracks running through the center
dark wooden tram with multiple windows moving along tracks
multi-story stone buildings with large windows typical of 19th century architecture
tall deciduous trees lining the street with green spring foliage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a hazy morning in a historic city, walking along wet cobblestone streets lined with stone buildings. A vintage streetcar passes by on the tracks, moving from left to right across the frame. The camera follows the character as they navigate the street and turn right at an intersection.

events.description: passing through iron gates from cobblestone street into landscaped park area

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and approaching the park entrance with iron fencing

notable_agents.action: man in dark coat walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence with stone pillars marking park boundary
gated entrance with steps leading into the park gardens

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at the street corner, leaving the tram tracks behind. Approaching the park entrance, black wrought iron fences and stone pillars become prominent. The scene transitions from the open street to the gated park entrance, with the cobblestone giving way to a gravel path.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden with central equestrian monument

events.description: emerging from gate into open park plaza with statue becoming clearly visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the gravel path toward the central equestrian statue, passing benches and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in period dress sitting on wooden bench reading a book

entered.detail: large bronze statue of a figure on horseback on a tall stone pedestal
tall palm trees lining the garden paths with dense fronds
wooden slatted benches with people seated
circular flower beds with purple blooms surrounding the statue base

segments.scene_description: Entering the park proper, the space opens into a wide formal garden with gravel paths. A prominent equestrian statue rises in the center, surrounded by circular flower beds. Palm trees line the walkways, and pedestrians in period dress stroll or sit on benches. The hazy morning light filters through the trees, creating a warm atmosphere.

events.description: circling around the right side of the equestrian statue, changing direction to curve around the monument

agents.ego_description: circling around the statue base, observing the monument from different angles before continuing toward the park exit

notable_agents.action: group of women in long dresses standing at the statue base looking up at the monument

entered.detail: rear facade of stone building with columns and porch visible at park edge

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the right side of the equestrian statue, passing groups of NPCs admiring the monument. The camera curves around the flower beds, revealing the rear of a historic building with a columned porch. The path continues through shaded areas of the garden with dense palm foliage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy historic city that transitions from wet urban streets into a lush, formal garden. It begins by navigating wet cobblestones lined with stone buildings as a vintage streetcar passes across the frame, before the camera turns right at an intersection to leave the tracks behind. As the character approaches the park, the open street gives way to black wrought iron fences and stone pillars, with the cobblestones shifting into a gravel path at the gated entrance. The scene then expands into a wide formal garden where the camera moves past palm trees and pedestrians toward a prominent equestrian statue surrounded by circular flower beds. Finally, the camera curves around the monument and its admiring crowd, revealing a historic building with a columned porch before gliding into the shaded foliage of the garden.
